title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to automation, Architecture of Industrial Automation Systems,
Measurement Systems Characteristics, Level of automation, Automated flow
lines and transfer mechanisms,
Data Acquisition Management, Introduction to PLC, PLC functions.

title: Module 2
content:
Process Flows- process mapping, flows, input and output parameters,
Automation steps in process industries, PDCA (Plan, Do, Check Act)
automation cycle.
Introduction to Automatic Control:  P-I-D Control, PID Control Tuning,
Feed forward Ratio Control, Sequence Control.

title: Module 3
content:
Flow Control Valves, Hydraulic Control Systems, Pneumatic Control
Systems, Higher Level Automation Systems.
Introduction to computer-based industrial automation- Direct Digital
Control (DDC), Distributed Control System (DCS) and supervisory control
and data acquisition (SCADA) based architectures. SCADA for process
industries, Process Safety Automation: Levels of process safety and control.

title: Module 4
content:
Robotic Process Automation (RPA): Definition of RPA, RPA Applications,
RPA Tools and Platforms. Business ProcessManagement (BPM): Definition
of BPM, BPM Tools and Platforms, BPM vs RPA. Artificial Intelligence
(AI) andMachine Learning (ML): Definition of AI and ML, AI and ML
Applications in Process Automation, AI and ML Toolsand Platforms.
Integration and Data Management: Integration Platforms, Data Management
Tools, Data Analysis andReporting Tools.
